_schema: entities.<id> = { name, aliases: [string], region, connections: ['map:<id>'], recommendedLevel: [min, max] | null, notes }

kerning_city.name: Kerning City

dead_mine_jq.name: Dead Mine JQ

dragon_canyon.notes: Wyverns — Tough Dragon Skin (HT alt content).

mushroom_shrine.name: Mushroom Shrine
